# Mnestis — llms.txt (repo root)

> The memory layer for software — local-first codebase intelligence for humans and AI.

- Website: https://mnestis.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/bitreonx/Mnestis
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/mnestis
- Install: npx mnestis launch . --platform cursor

## Summary

Mnestis scans a repository, builds a dependency graph, discovers domains, capabilities, and user journeys, and writes structured memory to `.mnemos/`. Outputs: HTML report, AI Pack v1, MCP tools, Cursor/Claude steering.

## Commands

- `npx mnestis .` — analyze and generate DNA
- `npx mnestis launch . --platform cursor` — build + Cursor rules + MCP
- `npx mnestis launch . --platform claude` — build + Claude skills + Fable mindset

## Documentation

https://mnestis.vercel.app/docs
